name: Blog
description: Plugin oficial editorial para gerenciar posts publicados no ecossistema do core.
author: Core Team

permissions.name: View Posts
permissions.description: Permite listar e consultar posts no admin do plugin Blog.

permissions.name: Create Posts
permissions.description: Permite criar novos posts no plugin Blog.

permissions.name: Edit Posts
permissions.description: Permite editar posts existentes no plugin Blog.

permissions.name: Publish Posts
permissions.description: Permite publicar posts no plugin Blog.

permissions.name: Delete Posts
permissions.description: Permite remover posts do plugin Blog.

permissions.name: Manage Categories
permissions.description: Permite listar, criar e editar categorias editoriais do plugin Blog.

permissions.name: Manage Tags
permissions.description: Permite listar, criar e editar tags editoriais do plugin Blog.

permissions.name: Manage Blog Settings
permissions.description: Permite governar os settings persistidos do plugin oficial Blog.

fields.label: Blog Title
fields.description: Titulo publico principal usado na listagem editorial do blog.

fields.label: Blog Intro
fields.description: Texto curto de apoio exibido na listagem publica do blog.
fields.default: Listagem publica editorial do plugin oficial Blog.

fields.label: Show Excerpts
fields.description: Exibe o resumo dos posts na listagem publica quando ativo.
